description: letter_counts returns a list of 26 counts, adding 1 to slot ord(c)-97 for each letter a-z and ignoring other characters
most_common_letter returns the letter with the highest count, breaking ties toward the earlier letter (strict > scan)
crack_by_frequency ranks cipher letters by frequency and maps them onto ENGLISH_FREQ_ORDER, translating the whole message
Reuses letter_counts, builds a mapping for all 26 letters, keeps spaces unchanged, a return on every function
